headline: Zillow (NASDAQ:ZG) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
summary: Online real estate marketplace Zillow (NASDAQ:ZG) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 18.4% year on year to $708 million. Its GAAP profit of $0.19 per share was significantly above analysts’ consensus estimates.
